title: cew pink
description: Just your average crystal pvp/sword pvp pack
body:
This pack is the pack that I use all the time and I think its prob one of the best packs of all time for pot but this pack can also be used for crystal pvp


Use optifine or cit-resewn for fabric and use fabric skyboxes for the sky

when using cit-resewn if your are offhanding a dia sword that has kb 1 or 2 it will turn blue
